titleStmt.title: Letter from A.J. Cockinton to the Registrar, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland, 16 August 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: A.J. Cockington

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from A.J. Cockington, on behalf of the General Council of Medical Education & Registration for the United Kingdom, to the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland (RCPI) enclosing a copy of the resolution of the General Medical Council in regards to professional education.

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.persName: Registrar, Royal College of Physicians of Ireland
correspAction.placeName: Royal College of Physicians, Kildare Street, Dublin, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
General Council of
Medical Education & Registration
of the United Kingdom.
44 Hallam Street, Portland Place, London. W. August 16,1916 Dear Sir, You may have noticed in the Partial Volume of
Minutes which has been sent to you by the Council's
Printers that on May 27, 1916, the Council considered a
Report by the Education Committee on the subject of the
Teaching of Medical Ethics and adopted a Recommendation
of the Committee thereon (see Minutes, May 27, 1916, No. 8,
appendix V. ) This Recommendation has been incorporated in
a revised issue of the Council's Resolution in regard
to Professional Education, of which I enclose a copy.
Further copies can be supplied if desired. The Recommenda-
tion is No. IX on page 5. Yours faithfully, A.J. COCKINGTON
Acting Registrar. To the Registrar
of the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland
Kildare Street
Dublin Madcd.C
6.X.16
